commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 13:13 So David brought not the ark home to himself to the city of David, but carried it aside into the house of Obed-edom the Gittite. Douay Rheims 1609 And for this cause he brought it not unto himself, that is, into the city of David, but turned it away into the house of (a) Obededom the (b) Getheite. (a) Obededom was a Levite, (c. ) and therefore more meet to keep the ark: (b) Called a Getheite because he had dwelt in the town of Geth.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Obededom. A Levite was judged more proper to guard the ark, chap. xv. 18.
Gethite. Because he had dwelt in Geth. (Worthington)

methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
